steps.t: Batâla has asked you to deliver meals to the residents of Ahâba. You should collect the packaged meals. They are in a bag near Batâla's hut.
You have collected the package of meals to deliver to the residents of Ahâba. You should deliver the meals to Beltáni shepherds and hunters around the…
You have delivered meals to the Beltáni. You should return to Batâla.
